Post.title: Food Plaza Post
Post.description: A user-generated post with food photos and reviews

userId.description: The UID of the user who created the post

userName.description: The display name of the user

userAvatar.description: The avatar URL of the user

content.description: The text content of the review

imageUrl.description: The URL of the food photo

restaurantId.description: Optional ID of the restaurant being reviewed

likes.description: Array of user UIDs who liked the post
